hooks.command: notify-send "Claude Code: $(basename "$PWD")" "✅ Task completed\n$(pwd)"; paplay /usr/share/sounds/freedesktop/stereo/message.oga; sleep 0.05; paplay /usr/share/sounds/freedesktop/stereo/complete.oga

notify-send "Claude Code: $(basename "$PWD")" "✏️ Permission needed\n$(pwd)" -u critical; paplay /usr/share/sounds/freedesktop/stereo/dialog-warning.oga; sleep 0.05; paplay /usr/share/sounds/freedesktop/stereo/dialog-warning.oga

notify-send "Claude Code: $(basename "$PWD")" "✏️ Input needed\n$(pwd)";paplay /usr/share/sounds/freedesktop/stereo/dialog-information.oga; sleep 0.05; paplay /usr/share/sounds/freedesktop/stereo/dialog-information.oga
